message:
fix(doctor): treat agent CLI checks as optional in exit code logic

The missingRequired check was incorrectly treating agent CLI checks
(claude, codex, gemini) as required, causing exit code 1 when any
agent wasn't installed. This broke CI environments where these tools
aren't available.

Fix: Explicitly list only ntm, cass, cm as potentially required tools.
Agent CLIs and agentMail are now correctly treated as optional and
won't affect the exit code when missing.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
